headline: Mondelēz (NASDAQ:MDLZ) Beats Q1 Estimates but Adjusted Profit Drops, Stock Edges Up After-Hours
summary: Mondelēz beats Q1 estimates with $10.08B revenue and $0.67 adjusted EPS, but profit margins drop due to inflation. Stock edges up 1.2% after-hours amid cautious outlook.
